title: OTel Logs Reporter
description: Reports API gateway request logs to Google Cloud Logging via OpenTelemetry OTLP

exporter.description: Export mode: 'otlp' sends via OTLP gRPC to an OTel Collector; 'gcloud' writes directly to Cloud Logging REST API.

endpoint.description: OTLP gRPC endpoint (used only when exporter=otlp).

gcloud.description: Google Cloud Logging settings (used only when exporter=gcloud).

projectId.description: GCP project ID where logs are written. Required when exporter=gcloud.

logName.description: Cloud Logging log name (appears under projects/{projectId}/logs/{logName}).

credentialsFile.description: Path to a service-account key JSON file. Omit to use Application Default Credentials (recommended on GKE via Workload Identity).
